name: se-monitor-explicit-staleness
title: Define deterministic monitor-state staleness
description: Review snapshot 726d2d57c275b1d600940fbd523528081a43a898bfdaac2cdad34dec06fba0ae; finding 5.2.12.1. Define when monitor state is stale through an explicit policy or source-specific continuity failure so identical state selects the same recovery branch. Affected templates: templates/skills/se-monitor/SKILL.md and templates/skills/_shared/references/state-schema.md; focused tests under tests/test_skills.py.
